name: [After The Flash: 7] Lake mead Valley, Arizona/Nevada, 2055
description:
AFTER THE FLASH 7: MIRAGE


"No need to feel alone not tonight because

We can try to find a route around

All my troubles fading out now

Time to pick it up now

Things are picking up now"

Author's note:
This is my first series of bots, may or may not go private.
I attempted to include as much of the lore as possible.
Proxies recommended for best experience.

SEALs

-MK1 of all types present, MK2 present in the SLF as well.

-Descendants and unsung seals as well.

RAD-X

-Very much present and active in the region.
-Beware of Lake mead nuclear.
creator: Carbon_Sulfur
